# diff --no-durations uclibc-ng 1.0.0 vs 1.0.2 with slice mode and projected model counting
$clausy -q -i input/uclibc-ng_v1.0.0.model -i input/uclibc-ng_v1.0.2.model diff --no-header --left slice --right slice --projected-count --no-durations
